notes.text: We've added new content aggregations and properties to the Page building block
We now include the context from the navigation entities of DataFieldWithIBN and DataFieldForIBN using their mapping annotations
You can now use the isPartOfPreview attribute to show and hide custom sections on an object page
You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
We've introduced the AINotice building block to add a notice about AI-generated content
We now suppress links and render them as texts in the value help dialog.
We've resolved an issue where multiple dropdown rows were created because of too many data requests
We have resolved an issue where horizontal scrollbars did not render correctly in tables after exiting full-screen mode
You can now enable the save and back feature to allow users to save an object page and navigate back to the list report page
We now ensure that fields that share the same value help collection can have different values in action parameter dialogs
We now support the experimental methods of sap.fe.macros.table.Table and sap.fe.macros.table.TreeTable in the Table building block
You can now use the imageFitType property to specify how an image fits in the avatar
We now correctly apply the defaultCreationMode manifest setting to the Table building block
We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
